query: SELECT DISTINCT address FROM establishments WHERE address LIKE '%Brasilio%' OR address LIKE '%Domingos de Morais%' OR address LIKE '%Vergueiro%' OR address LIKE '%Consolacao%' OR address LIKE '%Itapetininga%' OR address LIKE '%Paraiso%' OR address LIKE '%Liberdade%' OR address LIKE '%Jose%' LIMIT 20;
